title: capsella helsingica
intro: Capsella helsingica, also known as Finnish shepherd's purse, is a plant species in the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its small, white flowers and triangular seed pods. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and reducing inflammation. Capsella helsingica has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help in preventing oxidative stress and promoting overall health. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of menstrual cramps, bloating, and other gynecological issues.
